SEPT 15, 2026
SlideForge Summit 2026

The first conference dedicated to AI-native content composition. One day. 500 seats. Virtual + In-Person.

What's Happening

✦
Keynote: The Death of the Design Sprint (Ishan Parihar)
✦
Workshop: Building Your First Campaign Preset
✦
Panel: AI Composition vs Human Design — The Real Debate
✦
Live Demo: From Brief to Carousel in 60 Seconds
✦
Networking: Meet the community building the future of slides

slideforge.dev #slides #campaign
“

The future of content isn't AI replacing designers. It's AI freeing designers to do what they actually got into design for — solving problems, not dragging boxes.

Ishan Parihar

SLIDEFORGE EVENT MOBILIZATION
slideforge.dev #slides #campaign

Why Attend

🎓
1

Learn

Hands-on workshops with the SlideForge team. Build real carousels, not toy demos.

🤝
2

Connect

Meet 500 content creators, developers, and marketers building with AI-native tools.

3

Ship

Leave with a complete campaign ready to publish. Not a notebook of ideas — a working pipeline.

🎁
4

Exclusive Access

Attendees get early access to Nexus 4.0 and the preset marketplace.
